metadata.description: Public distribution mirror of the BroadBanner Cowork plugins.

plugins.name: broadbanner-episode-pipeline
plugins.description: End-to-end episode processing for Banner and Backbone Media. Orchestrates section selection, transcript download, transcript correction, episode review generation, and Pages publishing from a single Substack post URL.

plugins.name: broadbanner-restream
plugins.description: Restream workflow automation for Banner and Backbone Media. Schedule live stream events in Restream Studio and publish clips to TikTok, YouTube, and Facebook via the Restream clips UI.

plugins.name: broadbanner-scheduling
plugins.description: Scheduled-task management for BroadBanner Cowork projects. Registers declarative scheduled-task specs (cron or one-time) into the Cowork scheduler from a project's .broadbanner/scheduled-tasks/ directory, filed under the project the skill is run from. Reusable across brands and expandable to any custom scheduled skill.

plugins.name: broadbanner-social-distribution
plugins.description: Social media distribution toolkit for Banner and Backbone Media. Post text or image notes to Substack/Bluesky/Threads, schedule Substack and Restream live streams, track cross-platform distribution status, and manage social publishing workflows.
